profile_target.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-after-ed0v4-profile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|pinv_256x128_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|eig_48x48_f64)' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

lever: Widen the exact-order GEMM row tile from MR=4 to MR=6 so each loaded B vector is reused across six output rows.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-jwkcc-baseline cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

candidate.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-jwkcc-after cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/matmul_2d_2048x2048x2048_f64' --sample-size 10 --warm-up-time 1 --measurement-time 3

result.reason: MR6 preserved behavior but more than doubled runtime, consistent with register pressure/spills outweighing B-vector reuse.

proof.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_WORKERS=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/frankenjax-rch-fjlax-jwkcc-proof cargo test -p fj-lax --lib matmul_2d -- --nocapture
isomorphism: dtype, shape, and error behavior unchanged
